outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Negative aggregate GEX (-14.79B) creates instability. Dealers short gamma must sell into weakness and buy into strength, amplifying spot movements.
outlook.summary: Market is in a precarious Gamma Trap. While 0DTE flows show bullish 'reverse smirk' speculation targeting 665, the structural Weekly/Monthly positioning is heavily bearish (PCR > 1.6) with massive negative GEX. The divergence between short-term call buying and heavy institutional put hedging at 660/650 sets up a volatile battle. Expect aggressive dealer selling if spot loses 660 support.

levels.motivazione: Critical Resonance level: Major Put OI support in Weekly (65k) and Monthly (138k) acts as the primary 'Line in the Sand'. 0DTE activity confirms defense here. Dealers must hedge aggressively if this breaks.
Dominant 0DTE Put Open Interest (36.7k) serves as the immediate downside magnet and 'hard' floor. High Volume/OI ratio indicates active defense.
Confluence of 0DTE Max Pain and High Call OI (24k). This is the dealer's target zone. 'Reverse Smirk' in 0DTE confirms call selling pressure here, capping upside.
Monthly Call Wall (50k OI) represents the ceiling for any structural rally. Resistance increases significantly near this level.
Weekly and Monthly Max Pain level. Price tends to gravitate towards this level to expire worthless, acting as a medium-term attractor.
Monthly Gamma Flip. A break below this confirms a shift to extreme negative gamma territory, likely triggering a liquidation cascade.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to deeply negative GEX (-1.24B 0DTE, -3.28B MONTHLY). Dealers short gamma will amplify all price movements. Expect acceleration on any directional break.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at critical 590 RESONANCE support. Negative gamma regime across all expiries creates volatile conditions. 600 Max Pain is magnetic target. Reverse smirk in 0DTE suggests short-term bullish bias despite bearish weekly skew.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant PUT strike across ALL expiries - 0DTE (7088 OI, 163K vol), WEEKLY (24116 OI), MONTHLY (80967 OI). Spot testing this critical support. Negative GEX amplifies defense importance.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MM DEFENSE: Critical support at spot

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Primary CALL resistance across ALL expiries - 0DTE (7153 OI), WEEKLY (6339 OI - top call), MONTHLY (47849 OI - top call). Major upside ceiling.
CONFLUENCE: Max Pain alignment 0DTE + MONTHLY. Strong CALL OI (6584 0DTE, 45314 MONTHLY). 1.7% from spot - primary MM target zone.
Structural support across all expiries: 0DTE (5421 OI, 22K vol), WEEKLY (5744 OI), MONTHLY (59310 OI). Key secondary defense in short gamma regime.
0DTE highest PUT OI (8784) with massive volume (106K). Immediate tactical support just below spot. High activity signals strong intraday defense.
Secondary CALL resistance: 0DTE (6810 OI), WEEKLY (4582 OI), MONTHLY (24245 OI). Intermediate barrier before 610 major wall.
MONTHLY gamma flip pivot. Critical level where cumulative GEX transitions. Breach triggers volatility regime acceleration.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive total GEX suppresses price action
outlook.summary: Bullish structure confirmed. Spot trades above 0DTE gamma flip with reverse smirk skew supporting upside. Max pain levels (6690/6850) above spot suggest upward drift toward CALL walls. Strong PUT support at 6500-6400 zone limits downside.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant CALL OI across all expiries. 0DTE: 12,674 | Weekly: 6,823 | Monthly: 38,733 PUT. Ultimate upside cap.
RESONANCE: Massive Monthly OI (88,013 CALL / 86,749 PUT). Primary structural resistance with dealer hedging pressure.
RESONANCE + Monthly Max Pain. Dealer target zone with significant OI in all expiries. Magnetic attraction expected.
0DTE Max Pain level. Short-term magnetic target for market makers. Expect price attraction today.
0DTE Gamma Flip. Critical pivot separating positive/negative gamma regimes. Spot above = dealers support prices.
RESONANCE PUT WALL. Significant PUT OI across all expiries: 0DTE 5,505 | Weekly 3,089 | Monthly 17,591. Major structural support.
CONFLUENCE: Highest 0DTE PUT OI (14,881) + Weekly (2,930). Deep support with heavy hedging activity.
